title: Server State vs. UI State
description: Architect clear separation between server state and ephemeral UI state within an application. Implement the Stale-While-Revalidate (SWR) pattern to manage cache invalidation and data synchronization.
objectives: Architect clear separation between server state and ephemeral UI state within an application.
Implement the Stale-While-Revalidate (SWR) pattern to manage cache invalidation and data synchronization.
